comment: 19 Jul 2026 reassessment flight. Run A verdict: label head costs ~2x cleanup dE at 1.9M params, flatten buys 5-9% at the engine. Two suspects for the tax: (1) CE loss pressure too high, (2) capacity contention. One probe each, plus a short compiled-recipe sanity run first (compare its epoch means vs labels-10k-a's first 40 epochs before trusting the two real runs).
